# Trace Matrix (auto-generated stub)

> This file is regenerated by `trace-validator --emit-matrix`. Until the validator is implemented, this is a hand-written seed.

## Status legend
- 🟢 green — code + tests + docs + journey all in place; `last_validated` recent
- 🟡 yellow — proposed/pending; at least one layer empty
- 🔴 red — accepted FR with a missing layer
